title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cognizant Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Cognizant Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
